hypothesis: If the MatAgent framework, which combines LLM-driven planning and proposition with external tools, diffusion-based crystal structure estimation, and iComFormer evaluation, is used to generate inorganic compositions and structures, then the generated candidates will achieve formation energies within ±0.25 eV/atom of target values and exhibit higher compositional validity, uniqueness, and novelty, outperforming tool-free LLM variants and MatterGen because integrated reasoning and iterative feedback guide more efficient exploration of the composition–structure space.
